text.en: Austen Summers - Approach Patterns

opener-direct-compliment.speaker: me

text.en: Excuse me, I was walking over there and I saw you and you looked very cute, so I thought I'd come say hi.

opener-direct-compliment.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'I was walking over there and then I saw you and you looked very Italian and very cute so I thought I'd come say hi'), How to Date a Blonde Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s], multiple videos

direct-her-positive.speaker: her

text.en: Hi! Thank you.

direct-her-positive.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc] multiple approach videos

direct-her-shy.speaker: her

text.en: Hi, I don't speak English.

direct-her-shy.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'Hi, I don't speak English')

direct-her-boyfriend.speaker: her

text.en: I have a boyfriend.

direct-her-boyfriend.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc], Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI], How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc], Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc]

text.en: I'm actually in a rush / heading somewhere.

direct-introduce-name.speaker: me

text.en: My name's Austin, by the way. What's your name?

direct-introduce-name.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw], Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'My name's Austin, by the way'), Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s], multiple videos

text.en: I'm [Name]. Nice to meet you.

direct-commonality-where-from.speaker: me

text.en: Where are you from? Are you from here or...?

direct-commonality-where-from.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Are you from like the North Pole?'), Basic Daygame [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'No? Where are you from?'), Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s], Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI]

direct-her-from-abroad.speaker: her

text.en: I'm from Sweden / Chile / Turkey / Finland...

direct-her-from-abroad.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (Sweden), Basic Daygame [H3_8iPikhDw] (Chile), Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (Turkey), Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s] (Finland)

direct-her-local.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, I live here.

direct-her-local.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (from Windsor, studying in Toronto)

direct-relate-to-country.speaker: me

text.en: I was in [country]! I was in [city]. I only know a few things in [language]... like lingonberry, meatballs, midsummer.

direct-relate-to-country.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'I was in Chile. I was in Santiago'), Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'I know like lingonberry... and then very typical with meatballs... midsummer')

text.en: Oh really? No way!

direct-what-do-you-do.speaker: me

text.en: What do you do? Are you a student or...?

direct-what-do-you-do.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'So you're like a new student at U of T trying to get your life together?'), Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'What are you studying?')

direct-her-student.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, I study [subject] at [school].

direct-her-student.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (English at Ryerson), Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (diving athlete)

direct-her-working.speaker: her

text.en: I work as a [job] / I'm a teacher.

direct-her-working.source: Latina MILF [bzUa2cB61hU] (Spanish teacher at elementary school)

direct-what-are-you-up-to.speaker: me

text.en: What are you up to right now?

direct-what-are-you-up-to.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'What are you up to right now?'), Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s] (exact: 'What are you up to right now?'), 7 Minute Pull [nFjdyAHcTgA]

direct-her-free.speaker: her

text.en: I just finished my last exam / I'm going back to find some coffee.

direct-her-free.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'I just finished my last exam'), Finnish Girl [jPHmLAZON_s] (exact: 'I'm gonna go back first to find some coffee')

direct-tease-and-vibe.speaker: me

text.en: You don't skip leg day, that's for sure. You're pretty fun to hang out with.

direct-tease-and-vibe.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'You look like you don't skip leg day' and 'You're pretty fun to hang out with'), Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'So you don't skip leg day. Me neither.')

direct-her-laughs.speaker: her

text.en: No, I am! I'm an athlete, so... (laughs)

direct-her-laughs.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'No I am I'm an athlete so wait wait wait... I do diving')

direct-date-seed.speaker: me

text.en: Do you like bubble tea? What are you doing this weekend?

direct-date-seed.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Do you like bubble tea... What are you doing this weekend?'), Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (Snakes and Lattes), Basic Daygame [H3_8iPikhDw] (sushi), Pickup Motivation [wHQW1s5FzkY] (boba)

direct-her-down-for-date.speaker: her

text.en: This is the first weekend for a long time that I'm free.

direct-her-down-for-date.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'I'm actually like this is the first weekend for a long time that I'm free')

direct-lock-in-date.speaker: me

text.en: Saturday I can pencil you in for a 6pm bubble tea appointment. How do you feel about bubble tea on Saturday at 6pm with a cute American boy?

direct-lock-in-date.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Saturday I can pencil you in for a 6pm bubble tea appointment... how do you feel about bubble tea on Saturday at 6pm with a cute American boy')

text.en: Yeah, sounds good.

direct-get-number.speaker: me

text.en: What's your number? Do you have an American number?

direct-get-number.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Okay wait, what's your number? Do you have an American number?'), How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc] (exact: 'What's your number?'), Basic Daygame [H3_8iPikhDw]

direct-her-gives-number.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, I do. [gives number]

direct-her-gives-number.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Yeah, I do'), How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc], Swedish Hockey [KURlBcRF6-M]

text.en: Yeah, here's my Instagram.

direct-warm-goodbye.speaker: me

text.en: It was lovely meeting you. I hope you have a wonderful rest of your day.

direct-warm-goodbye.source: Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'Well it was lovely meeting you... I hope you have a wonderful rest of your day'), Basic Daygame [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'Well, it was nice meeting you... have a good day')

direct-switch-language.speaker: me

text.en: Do you speak Spanish? Hola, me llamo Austin.

direct-switch-language.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'Do you speak Spanish? Yes? Okay'), Latina MILF [bzUa2cB61hU], Pickup Motivation [wHQW1s5FzkY] (exact: 'Hola, me llamo Austin')

text.en: Si!

direct-spanish-commonality.speaker: me

text.en: You're going to teach me Spanish and I'm going to teach you English. Do you like tea or coffee more?

direct-spanish-commonality.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'So you're going to teach me Spanish and I'm going to teach you English. Do you like tea or coffee more?')

direct-spanish-date-seed.speaker: me

text.en: Do you like sushi? Someday we are going for sushi or something with my doggy.

direct-spanish-date-seed.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'Do you like sushi?... Someday we are going for sushi or something with my doggy. She likes salmon.')

direct-spanish-instagram.speaker: me

text.en: Do you have an app called Instagram? Does it exist in your country?

direct-spanish-instagram.source: A Basic Daygame Approach [H3_8iPikhDw] (exact: 'Do you have an app called Instagram?... Does it exist in your country?')

boyfriend-goalie.speaker: me

text.en: Just because there's a goalie doesn't mean you can't score.

boyfriend-goalie.source: Swedish Hockey Player [KURlBcRF6-M] (exact: 'Just because there's a goalie doesn't mean you can't score')

boyfriend-instagram-pivot.speaker: me

text.en: I'll grab your Instagram, and that way when the photos of him disappear, then I'll know it's time.

boyfriend-instagram-pivot.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'I just wanted to grab your Instagram, and then when the photos of him disappear, then I'll know it's time to loop back into your DMs'), How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc] (exact: 'I'll grab your Instagram and that way when you stop dating him then I'll know it's time')

boyfriend-penalty-box.speaker: me

text.en: Even if he was, I'd take two minutes in the penalty box for cheating.

boyfriend-penalty-box.source: Swedish Hockey Player [KURlBcRF6-M] (exact: 'Even if he was, I'd take two minutes in the penalty box for cheating')

boyfriend-graceful-exit.speaker: me

text.en: No worries. Well, it was nice meeting you. Have a good day.

boyfriend-graceful-exit.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc]

text.en: You seem cool.

boyfriend-get-number.speaker: me

text.en: Let me grab your number. Later we'll go skating on a lake.

boyfriend-get-number.source: Swedish Hockey Player [KURlBcRF6-M] (exact: 'Let me grab your number... Later we'll go skating on a lake')

text.en: 8-4-7... [gives number]

boyfriend-save-name.speaker: me

text.en: We'll save it as Austin Carlson, number one defenseman in Sweden.

boyfriend-save-name.source: Swedish Hockey Player [KURlBcRF6-M] (exact: 'We'll save it as Austin Carlson, number one defenseman in Sweden')

boyfriend-her-gives-ig.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, sure. Here's my Instagram.

boyfriend-her-gives-ig.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc]

busy-walk-with.speaker: me

text.en: I'll walk with you for two minutes, then I have to go.

busy-walk-with.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (Austen teaching: 'I'll walk with you for two minutes then I have to go... these lines should be embedded in your head')

text.en: Yeah, okay.

busy-quick-close.speaker: me

text.en: I don't want to hold you up. Let me grab your number real quick and we can continue this another time.

busy-quick-close.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (pattern: quick number close when girl is busy), Swedish Blonde [D1t_K8hjJzc] (exact: 'I don't want to hold you up by the way')

opener-observational.speaker: me

text.en: Hi, excuse me. I was back there and I saw your very, very colorful backpack. It almost looks like you'd be selling it here like an art festival backpack or something.

opener-observational.source: Rembrantplein [srq1OVqxX0E] (exact: 'I was back there and I saw your very, very colorful backpack. It almost looks like you'd be selling it here like an art festival backpack or something.')

text.en: Oh really?
Hi! Thank you, that's sweet.

obs-elaborate.speaker: me

text.en: You look quite adorable. My name is Austin, by the way.

obs-elaborate.source: Rembrantplein [srq1OVqxX0E] (exact: 'You look quite adorable, but Brazilian'), Casey Neistat [fbRpUOxqWcs] (exact: 'you look quite adorable on the ice')

text.en: I'm [Name].
What are you up to right now? Are you from around here?
Just hanging out / I just finished [activity].
I'm actually heading somewhere.

obs-connection-building.speaker: me

text.en: We should be best friends on Instagram. Do you have this app called Instagram?

obs-connection-building.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'Do you have this app called Instagram?'), Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'We're going to be best friends on Facebook')

text.en: Yes, I have it. Here.

obs-warm-close.speaker: me

text.en: I'll visit you when I'm in [city]. We'll get married, we'll have 14 children. It was nice to meet you.

obs-warm-close.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'I'll visit you when I'm in Turkey. When I'm in Turkey we'll get married, we'll have 14 children')

opener-situational.speaker: me

text.en: There was a bee literally just chasing me like 50 meters. And then I saw you with your dollar bag, and you looked quite cute.

opener-situational.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'There was a bee literally just chasing me like 50 meters, and I was like holy shit. This bee is gonna eat me. And then I saw you with your dollar bag, and you looked quite cute.')

text.en: (laughs) What did you buy there?

situational-banter.speaker: me

text.en: I'm guessing you study marketing... no? You look Russian, that's why.

situational-banter.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'I'm guessing you study marketing. No. English. Yeah. Where are you from? I look at basic, but I said white girl study. You look Russian, that's why.')

situational-her-banters-back.speaker: her

text.en: Fuck off! I don't have an accent.

situational-her-banters-back.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'Fuck off! I don't have an accent.')

situational-connection.speaker: me

text.en: Last time I was up this early, I think Pluto was still a planet. But you do seem cool.

situational-connection.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (exact: 'Last time I was up this early, I think Pluto was still a planet' and 'But on the real though, you do seem cool')

situational-seed-date.speaker: me

text.en: Have you been to Snakes and Lattes? We should go sometime.

situational-seed-date.source: Shy College Girl [-gg0Ykxalkk] (Snakes and Lattes date location, seeded guitar battle at his place)

opener-high-energy.speaker: me

text.en: Excuse me, hi! It was like an athletic event to come talk to you guys. I saw you with your red hair and you looked absolutely adorable. What is your name?

opener-high-energy.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'Excuse me, hi! It was like an athletic event to come talk to you guys... I saw you with your red hair and you looked absolutely adorable. What is your name?')

text.en: Oh my god! (laughing)
This is real smooth. Look at him.

high-playful-command.speaker: me

text.en: Tell whoever you're talking to that you met a very beautiful young man in a wheelchair. You'll give them a call back.

high-playful-command.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'Tell whoever you're talking to that you met a very beautiful young man in a wheelchair, and you have to, like, talk for like a minute. You'll give them a call back.')

text.en: (Laughing) Okay, okay.

high-escalate-fun.speaker: me

text.en: Come on a coffee date with me right now. Let's get it.

high-escalate-fun.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'Come on a coffee date with me right now' and 'Coffee, let's get it')

high-her-objection.speaker: her

text.en: It is 1:30! What are you talking about coffee?

high-her-objection.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'It is 1.30! What are you talking about coffee?')

text.en: I'm so down.
Coffee, let's get it. I just got to sit down for a second.

high-her-relents.speaker: her

text.en: Okay, what is your number? Just punch it in.

high-her-relents.source: Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (exact: 'Okay, what is your number? Just punch it in.')

text.en: Just punch it in there. It was nice to meet you.

high-lead-instadate.speaker: me

text.en: Everybody, let's go! Come on, let's get to it!

high-lead-instadate.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'Everybody, let's go! Come on, let's get to it!')

high-her-group-resistance.speaker: her

text.en: We are pretty tired. We're thinking about going home.

high-her-group-resistance.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'We are pretty tired. We're thinking about going home.')

high-persistence-pull.speaker: me

text.en: You won't remember the nights you go home early, but you will remember the nights you party with us. After party, pizza, adventure, come on!

high-persistence-pull.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'You won't remember the nights you go home early, but you will remember the nights you party with a cool Swedish man' and 'after party, pizza, adventure, come on')

high-lead-taxi.speaker: me

text.en: Vamonos! Come on, vamonos! Lock arms with your girl.

high-lead-taxi.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'Vamonos! Come on, vamonos!' and 'You should lock arms with your girl')

opener-themed-humor.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me. I've been locked into a coding marathon all day, and I have to say you're still hotter than the bottom of my laptop.

opener-themed-humor.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'Hey excuse me I've been locked into like a coding marathon all day and I have to say you're still hotter than the bottom of my laptop')

text.en: (Laughing) Oh my god.
Wait, what?

themed-build-on-theme.speaker: me

text.en: I was chilling with my friend and I was thinking like whoever coded this simulation clearly spent a lot of time on you.

themed-build-on-theme.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'I was chilling with my friend back there and I was thinking like whoever coded this simulation clearly spent a lot of time on you')

themed-her-flattered.speaker: her

text.en: You're pretty smart then, I guess.

themed-her-flattered.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'You're pretty smart then, I guess')

themed-deeper-connection.speaker: me

text.en: There's a lot of coding languages, but there's only one universal language. You know what it is? It's body language.

themed-deeper-connection.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'There's a lot of coding languages, but there's only one universal language. You know what it is? It's body language.')

text.en: Oh my god. (laughs)

themed-close-number.speaker: me

text.en: I'd love to give this conversation more runtime, but I have a scrum meeting in like 10 minutes. We could code and chill sometime. I'll grab your number.

themed-close-number.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'I'd love to give this conversation more runtime, but you do have to go to class. I have a scrum meeting in like 10 minutes. So I'll just, I'll grab your number. We could code and chill sometime.')

themed-her-gives-number.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, yeah, of course.

themed-her-gives-number.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'Yeah, yeah, of course, of course')

text.en: I have a boyfriend.

themed-fun-close.speaker: me

themed-fun-close.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'Access granted' and 'Maybe we can play Mario Kart at this cafe near me. Has like 1,253 positive reviews.')

text.en: What's his typing speed? Like how many words a minute can he type? I've got 157 words a minute.

themed-boyfriend-override.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'What's his typing speed? Like how many words a minute can he finger? I have no idea. I've got 157 words a minute.')

text.en: I have no idea. (laughing)

themed-boyfriend-ig-close.speaker: me

text.en: No worries. I'm not here to execute a man-in-the-middle attack on a two-node network. I just wanted to grab your Instagram.

themed-boyfriend-ig-close.source: Software Developer [x2kk9HoXjnI] (exact: 'No worries. I'm not here to execute a man-in-the-middle attack on a two-node network. I just wanted to grab your Instagram')

opener-direct-honest.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me. I'm Austin. I don't mean to intrude, but I noticed you and I think you're really beautiful. I wanted to meet you.

opener-direct-honest.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc] (exact: 'Hey excuse me I'm Austin I don't mean to intrude you guys but I just wanted to say I noticed you're like very beautiful so I just wanted to like come say hi')

text.en: Oh my gosh! That's so sweet. What's your name?

honest-her-touched.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc]

honest-her-taken.speaker: her

text.en: This is my girlfriend / I have a boyfriend.

honest-her-taken.source: How to Ask a Girl Out [qWqNDrjfUvc] (exact: 'This is my girlfriend')

opener-nightgame.speaker: me

text.en: [Nightgame patterns - Barcelona/Toronto context]

opener-nightgame.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (Austen teaches nightgame open, vibe, lead, pull), Wheelchair [n0smMRCqVmc] (Toronto night approaches)

nightgame-open-front.speaker: me

text.en: Hey there, excuse me. I just saw you walking by.

nightgame-open-front.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact drills: 'Hey there, excuse me. I just saw you walking by' -- taught as approaching from front, giving space, not touching initially)

text.en: Hi! / No speak English.

nightgame-language-pivot.speaker: me

text.en: What language? Italian? You can teach me.

nightgame-language-pivot.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'What language? Italian. You can teach me.')

nightgame-vibe.speaker: me

text.en: This is the best bar here? Bling bling? Oh, like rappers in the United States. And you are from bling bling? Born here?

nightgame-vibe.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'This is the best bar club here... Bling bling? Oh, like rappers in the United States. Bling bling. And you are from Bling Bling? Born here?')

text.en: Yes! 23 years old.

nightgame-instagram-close.speaker: me

text.en: I have to go, but let's exchange Instagrams.

nightgame-instagram-close.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'I have to go, but let's exchange Instagrams')

text.en: Hi, I'm the fourth friend.
You're from England, yes?

nightgame-group-banter.speaker: me

text.en: The best way to learn a language is with private, one-on-one lessons with a native speaker. And I'm a native speaker.

nightgame-group-banter.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'The best way to learn a language is with private, one-on-one lessons with a native speaker. And I'm a native speaker.')

nightgame-group-seed-pull.source: Barcelona [iOSpNACA9VI] (exact: 'I have a new plan. Tonight we have fun and we go out after dinner because we're gonna eat with our friends, you eat with your friends and then we'll get all beautiful... and then we go out and we enjoy Barcelona because it's our last night')

instadate-lead.source: Latina MILF [bzUa2cB61hU] (exact: 'Hold my hand. Look both ways when you cross the street.')

instadate-downgrade.source: Latina MILF [bzUa2cB61hU] (exact: 'You're not hungry? I'll get you a tea. Do you know Uber?')

instadate-during.speaker: me

text.en: [During instadate: physical, playful, leading to venue changes]
